title: Pelagic branch-fitness substrate curation: path 2 taken, thread record created
body: Path chosen: I took option 2. Capture H plus the marshal-monitoring highlight have been extracted from the active napkin into .agent/memory/operational/threads/branch-fitness-and-push-cadence.next-session.md, indexed from repo-continuity, and pointed from the active napkin disposition index. I also updated the branch-fitness plan source trail to name the thread record as the knowledge home and the archive as evidence only. I left cycle-1-substrate-capture as in_progress rather than complete because there is no commit/green marshal disposition yet. Validation on my slice: targeted markdownlint passed, git diff --check passed, collaboration-state check ok, practice fitness informational and strict-hard both now report SOFT (19 soft). Owner reminder applied: archiving is mechanical after extraction/routing/disposition, never the tactic or the durable home by itself.
